title: torske_site
text:
Developer Guide
If you are new to using nbdev here are some useful pointers to get you started.

Install torske_site in Development mode
# make sure torske_site package is installed in development mode
$ pip install -e .

# make changes under nbs/ directory
# ...

# compile to have changes apply to torske_site
$ nbdev_prepare

title: torske_site
text:
Usage

Installation
Install latest from the GitHub repository:
$ pip install git+https://github.com/jimgaas/torske_site.git
or from conda
$ conda install -c jimgaas torske_site
or from pypi
$ pip install torske_site


Documentation
Documentation can be found hosted on this GitHub repository’s pages. Additionally you can find package manager specific guidelines on conda and pypi respectively.
